title: Room Temperature & Humidity Monitor Using ESP32
description:
A compact IoT-based system that monitors real-time room temperature and humidity using the ESP32. The data is displayed locally and can also be accessed remotely via Wi-Fi, making it ideal for smart homes, storage rooms, and environmental monitoring.
Components Used:
ESP32 Development Board
DHT11 / DHT22 Temperature & Humidity Sensor
OLED / LCD Display (optional)
Jumper Wires
Power Supply (USB / Battery)

title: Gas Leak Detector Using ESP32
description:
A smart IoT-based system that detects harmful gases like LPG, methane, and smoke using the ESP32. The system provides instant alerts through buzzer and LED, and can also send real-time notifications via Wi-Fi for remote safety monitoring in homes and industries.

Components Used:
ESP32 Development Board
MQ-2 / MQ-135 Gas Sensor
Buzzer Module
LED Indicator
Jumper Wires
Power Supply (USB / Battery)
